name: Matt's Queso
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Chicken broth (Low or No Salt)
3 cups Kraft American Cheese, grated (Not Cheddar)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
2. Add peppers, onions, and celery; cook until tender.
3. Stir in garlic and chicken broth.
4. In a separate skillet, cook and drain sliced sausage.
5. Add sausage to the vegetable mixture.
6. Gradually sprinkle in cheese, stirring continuously to melt.
7. Continue adding cheese until the queso reaches the desired thickness.
8. Stir in chopped tomato.
9. Serve the queso with chips as an appetizer, or over smoked potatoes, baked potatoes, sautéed spinach, broccoli, fried potatoes, or noodles.
